title: MRCHEESE
description:
Mrcheese (Mafia mod)
cheese cheese I NEED MORE CHEESE
Server Mod
body:
**Need Geckolib**
# Features
- cheese making
- cheese sale
- The Reputation mechanic is not finished
# What's this mod?
The mafia wants cheese, wants to resell it, and will give money to whoever helps them.
# Description
### In this mod, you have to sell cheese to the _"Mafia"_
in this mod there are 3 kinds of cheese, sour milk and 3 mobs
# Mobs
mafia don, mafioso and etc.
# AND THIS MOD IS MADE IN MCREATOR
